meaning: adj.未经检查(或调查、注意等)的
examples: Such cruel treatment was unlooked - for.
Nor fame I slight, not for her favors call; she comes unlooked for, if she comes at all.
Another unlooked-for trait that may hold him in good stead with voters during the next several weeks is his friendship with McCain.
But Colombia's internal strife is also giving Panama some unlooked-for economic benefits.
